_comment: Recorded ledgers from the Wave-1 BLIND live-run of the semantic detectors (2026-06-09, model claude-opus-4-8). Each ledger was produced by an engine that did NOT read the fixture's ground-truth/expected.json. The harness oracle (§18 in _chat_validation.py) scores these against expected.json deterministically (recall + FP), making the make-or-break number re-runnable: replace this file with a fresh blind run to re-measure across model/spec changes.

suppressed.reason: different operation (cancel != delete), AF-1(i)
equivalent upstream guard via findOrdersByUser, AF-1(iii)
read-only projection, different operation, AF-1(i)
unused adminOnly = dead code, Test-1' linter territory
hardcoded JWT default = secret/SAST territory, out of IF-1 scope
markPaid: different operation + upstream HMAC guard, AF-1(i)+(iii)
/refund: different entity+op + upstream guard, AF-1
placeOrder: owner-only satisfied by upstream authMiddleware, AF-1(iii)
IF-1(d): equivalent upstream HMAC guard exists, AF-1(iii)
decimal(12,2) == NUMERIC(12,2) base-type synonym, identical params
boolean == BOOLEAN identical base type
tinyint(1) == boolean MySQL synonym
no model-only fields; R7 no live DB connection so live-drift suppressed
order_events documented exception ADR-014 (asymmetric, contracted)
shared vocabulary, not a shared resource
WA-PAY-1 triggering condition (PROV-3821) still OPEN, not stale
ADR-007 conforms to code, no contradiction
ADR-014 matches code, no drift/name-lie/load-bearing TODO
highest churn but Peripheral; behaviour-first ranking, not churn-only
no co-change pair with no structural edge + shared resource
documented sanctioned append-only sink, ADR-014 (stock explicitly NOT covered)
order table single-writer, not coupling
Prisma singleton = shared infrastructure, not a named business resource
BR-pricing:001 legitimately EVOLVED (still reduces payable total), intent preserved
ADR-002 money-in-cents conforms, not violated
BR-orders:001 mechanism-vs-intent duplicate folded into ADR-001 root cause (Test-3 dedup)
sanctioned out-of-band drain worker, not a request path
benign memoization cache, no contradiction

ledgers.note: qualitative spot-read of a real shell-based plugin repo, no answer key; detectors stayed silent + precise (0 false alarms across 10 considered candidates)

suppressed.reason: co-enforced + fail-safe, no enforced-vs-unenforced contrast
different entity+operation than the validator; both advisory by design
fails OPEN toward scanning, never under-enforced
documented shared resource with an explicit interface contract
documented shared seam with a function contract
the state-file schema is the interface; below HIGH-confidence bar
scanner-allow instruction matches actual tool behavior
git-write draft-only discipline honored throughout
scanner ok:false asymmetry is deliberate + documented
no load-bearing TODO/FIXME on a core path

ledgers.note: IF-7(a) error-path-contradicts-a-documented-rule, COMMISSION sub-type — blind 4-lens run 2026-06-09 (literal lens recorded; ALL 4 lenses agreed: recall 3/3, FP 0, 9/9 traps seen-and-suppressed incl. the documented-exception T1). Semantic family: scored by §18 + the §27 static gates.

suppressed.reason: documented exception: chargeWithIdempotency marks paid only in the e.code==='idempotency_replay' branch, which ADR-014's own exception clause sanctions; else re-raises (clause 5 FALSE)
local reconciliation: chargeWithGuard's finally resets status to 'pending' when !charged, undoing the forbidden state before return (clause 4 FALSE)
not in an error handler: the ADR-007 inline-send contradiction is on the happy path of placeOrder — routes to IF-4, not IF-7(a) (clause 2 FALSE)
documented fail-open is the policy: BR-cache:002 requires serving origin/stale on a cache-read failure; the catch performs the required, not a forbidden, effect
soft/advisory rule: only a 'should probably ... (TODO)' comment, no deontic MUST and no ADR/BR record to anchor on (clause 1 FALSE)
one-sided / no documented rule: refundWithStatus's catch sets a status but no documented invariant governs this error behaviour to dual-cite (clause 1 FALSE)
rule not about a failure effect: ADR-002 is a money-representation rule with no failure clause; the default-rate catch contradicts no documented error invariant (clause 1 FALSE)
superseded rule: the keyed retry on timeout contradicts only ADR-009 (Status: Superseded); current policy sanctions it — a superseded record cannot anchor a live contradiction (clause 1/5 FALSE)
omission sub-type (commission-only measurement): the catch omits the BR-inv:001 release but executes no forbidden mutation — omission-from-absence is deferred (clause 3 FALSE)
